# Support

## How to get help

If you're having trouble with this project, here's how you can get help:

1.  **Read the Docs:** Check the `docs/` directory or the inline documentation in `src/`.
2.  **Search Issues:** Check the [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/4444j99/portfolio/issues) to see if your problem has already been reported.
3.  **Open an Issue:** If you can't find an answer, [open a new issue](https://github.com/4444j99/portfolio/issues/new).

## Response Time

This is a personal project. While I try to respond to issues quickly, please be patient.
